feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: Imagine all the Norwegians who casually have views like this out their bedroom or kitchen window 😭 the most beautiful country #norway #rosendalnorway #visitnorway #norwaytravel #norwaytiktok

entry.title: always double check what you're eating lol 🦗🦗🦗 nobody told us our mescal shots came with crickets and it was kinda dark in the restaurant so I thought they were like tiny peppers or something 🤡🤮 NOPE NOPE NOPE #mescal #cricket #gross #lol #omg #funny
entry.content: always double check what you're eating lol 🦗🦗🦗 nobody told us our mescal shots came with crickets and it was kinda dark in the restaurant so I thought they were like tiny peppers or something 🤡🤮 NOPE NOPE NOPE #mescal #cricket #gross #lol #omg #funny

entry.title: would you fly across the world just to eat one meal?? 🫣😱 Last week I finally ate at Iris, a Michelin star restaurant in Norway that floats in the middle of a fjord!!! 😱🇳🇴 ⭐️ Send this to a friend you want to eat here with!! ⭐️ (PS more Iris feed content c

entry.title: 30 waterfalls!? 😱 You haven't lived until you've done a Norway fjord cruise 🚢🇳🇴 A highlight of our Bergen trip was a cruise into the Mostraumen strait which is filled with waterfalls and towering mountains. Even though it was pouring rain, I had so much
entry.content: 30 waterfalls!? 😱 You haven't lived until you've done a Norway fjord cruise 🚢🇳🇴 A highlight of our Bergen trip was a cruise into the Mostraumen strait which is filled with waterfalls and towering mountains. Even though it was pouring rain, I had so much

entry.title: Replying to @Jan most beautiful hotel in Europe?!! 😱I absolutely fell in love with @hotelcharmante in Bergen, Norway. Every corner of this hotel is whimsical and elegant. And, that champagne button is pretty fun 🤩🥂 Oh, and you can't miss that secret bar
entry.content: Replying to @Jan most beautiful hotel in Europe?!! 😱I absolutely fell in love with @hotelcharmante in Bergen, Norway. Every corner of this hotel is whimsical and elegant. And, that champagne button is pretty fun 🤩🥂 Oh, and you can't miss that secret bar

entry.title: Replying to @Chris Cummings floating Michelin star restaurant in Norway! 🇳🇴😱 In the middle of an unassuming fjord in Norway is Iris , a new expedition dining concept that transcends everything you know about food and the sea. The team that just earned th
entry.content: Replying to @Chris Cummings floating Michelin star restaurant in Norway! 🇳🇴😱 In the middle of an unassuming fjord in Norway is Iris , a new expedition dining concept that transcends everything you know about food and the sea. The team that just earned th

entry.title: Only 28 stave churches are left in Norway😱 and I got to visit one!! Located in @Visit Bergen is Fantoft Stave Church, a beautiful medieval-style church that was originally built in 1150 and reconstructed in 1879 (and again in the 90's after it burnt down
entry.content: Only 28 stave churches are left in Norway😱 and I got to visit one!! Located in @Visit Bergen is Fantoft Stave Church, a beautiful medieval-style church that was originally built in 1150 and reconstructed in 1879 (and again in the 90's after it burnt down

entry.title: Replying to @Camilla Dine in the clouds on top of the tallest mountain in Bergen (643 meters / about 2100 feet!) @ulriken643.no takes you by cable car to the highest mountain in Bergen. From the top you have miles and miles of views of Bergen with sea, fj
entry.content: Replying to @Camilla Dine in the clouds on top of the tallest mountain in Bergen (643 meters / about 2100 feet!) @ulriken643.no takes you by cable car to the highest mountain in Bergen. From the top you have miles and miles of views of Bergen with sea, fj

entry.title: the cheese of gods where do i find this in America i need moreeeee #norway #cheese #browncheese #brunost
entry.content: the cheese of gods where do i find this in America i need moreeeee #norway #cheese #browncheese #brunost

entry.title: Thrifted traditional Norwegian sweaters in Bergen!! Uuf is right downtown and so good!!! So many fun gems i wish i had a bigger suitcase #norway #visitnorway #bergen #bergennorway #visitbergen #norwegiansweater #thrift #thriftingfinds #norwaytravel #whim
entry.content: Thrifted traditional Norwegian sweaters in Bergen!! Uuf is right downtown and so good!!! So many fun gems i wish i had a bigger suitcase #norway #visitnorway #bergen #bergennorway #visitbergen #norwegiansweater #thrift #thriftingfinds #norwaytravel #whim

entry.title: brb off to stress shop for ear plugs and candles #apartmentliving #renters #landlord #kamala #election #renterlife #sanfrancisco #bayarea
entry.content: brb off to stress shop for ear plugs and candles #apartmentliving #renters #landlord #kamala #election #renterlife #sanfrancisco #bayarea

entry.title: weird things I bought in Norway -- I love to raid the grocery stores and pharmacies when I travel, especially in Europe since they have stricter regulations on beauty, skincare and meds. Stocked up on pimple cream, magic aspirin, sunscreen and deodorant.
entry.content: weird things I bought in Norway -- I love to raid the grocery stores and pharmacies when I travel, especially in Europe since they have stricter regulations on beauty, skincare and meds. Stocked up on pimple cream, magic aspirin, sunscreen and deodorant.

entry.title: screaming into pillows is good, too 👀 this week has been super hard and I'm mostly lost for words. I will say this: the Whimsy community is a safe place if you are looking for more of those on the internet. ❤️ myself and my team value the lives of women,
entry.content: screaming into pillows is good, too 👀 this week has been super hard and I'm mostly lost for words. I will say this: the Whimsy community is a safe place if you are looking for more of those on the internet. ❤️ myself and my team value the lives of women,

entry.title: brb heading to Hogwarts in the mountains 💅 🚂 ❄️ The Yosemite Mountain Sugar Pine Railroad is literally right outside the park on the Oakhurst entrance. It’s an open-air train and if you time it right, you can see everything covered in snow! Feels so dang
entry.content: brb heading to Hogwarts in the mountains 💅 🚂 ❄️ The Yosemite Mountain Sugar Pine Railroad is literally right outside the park on the Oakhurst entrance. It’s an open-air train and if you time it right, you can see everything covered in snow! Feels so dang

entry.title: $8 box hair dye can look that good?!! 😱 I've been using this exact brand of hair dye for 10 years (my natural hair color is a dirty blonde but I think life is more fun as a redhead!) I've tricked so many people into thinking this is my natural hair color
entry.content: $8 box hair dye can look that good?!! 😱 I've been using this exact brand of hair dye for 10 years (my natural hair color is a dirty blonde but I think life is more fun as a redhead!) I've tricked so many people into thinking this is my natural hair color

entry.title: proof you don't need to spend big $$$ to make a big difference in your apartment!! I've been wanting to give our San Francisco bathroom a mini refresh for a while. I love the overall decor concept, so I found this bath mat by Quiet Town Home that literal

entry.title: the CUTEST California Christmas town you need to visit!!🎄😱 You know I'm in love with @visitmurphys - it's an adorable mountain town in Calaveras County that low-key feels like California's very one Stars Hollow year-round, but especially during the holida

entry.title: BEST Christmas lights in the Bay Area just launched!! 🎄😱 I love @_filoli year round but it gets EXTRA magical at Christmas time. The gardens transform into a magical North Pole Christmas wonderland with tons of lights (including a light tunnel!), hangin

entry.title: did I spend $40 on pretty rocks? Yes i did. Successful crystal shopping day in the Haight in San Francisco!! Found some good pretty rocks hehe #thehaight #sanfrancisco #sanfranciscovlog #bayarea #onlyinsf #whimsysoul #bayarea #crystals #crystaltok #crysta

entry.title: Morning stroll on Ocean Beach with a Snowy Plover in hand is pure bliss ⭐️🌊 ☕️ ✨ especially on crisp autumn mornings! Took my new @POPFLEX Active set for a test drive. Love how comfy it is and the leggings even have pockets!!!! ❤️ Linked my whole outfit

entry.title: wait, this viral cone IS worth the hype!!😱🎄🍦 Christmas doesn't start in San Francisco until you have this viral Soft Serve Croissant Cone at @@millerandluxprovisions (bonus points if you go ice skating the Union Square rink afterward) Have you tried it
